summary: Tested RRHH Prenómina module - all backend API endpoints and frontend UI features working correctly. Created comprehensive test suite for the Prenómina functionality.

issues: ResumenDiario modal appears frequently and can block interactions - consider adding a 'Don't show again today' persistent cookie

frontend_ui: Display KPI cards (Prenóminas count, Total Horas, Importe Bruto, Importe Neto)
Calculate all prenominas (bulk) button with confirmation
Prenominas table with columns: Empleado, DNI, H. Normales, H. Extra, Total Horas, Importe Bruto, Importe Neto, Estado, Acciones
Detail modal showing: Desglose de Horas, Total Horas, Días Trabajados, Importe Bruto, Importe Neto, Deducciones

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - existing prenominas in database used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prenómina module fully tested. Backend has 15 passing tests in test_prenomina.py covering all CRUD operations and exports. Frontend has 13 passing tests in rrhh-prenomina.spec.ts covering UI navigation, KPIs, calculations, modal, validations, and exports. Note: The ResumenDiario modal requires use of addLocatorHandler or dismissModal helper to handle automatic dismissal.
